questions.question: Q1. First, which one issue facing California today do you think is the most important for the governor and state legislature to work on in 2026?

Health care, health insurance, health costs, prescription drug costs, Affordable Care Act
State budget, deficit, taxes, state spending
Water, water quality, water availability, drought
Threats to democracy or political extremism
